title: pilosella iserana subsp. subfasciculata
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. subfasciculata, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella iserana plant, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
